title: Silly SMP mod pack
description: This is the official mod pack for the Silly SMP
body:
# Welcome to the Silly SMP mod pack!

The Silly SMP mod pack gives the game the upgraded feeling it needs with the mods listed at the bottom of the page!*

This mod pack gives you the Minecraft update you need with mods that take it a step up. This mod pack is also available for an open Minecraft server all in one place!

We are going to continue to update this modpack over the coming months so if you have any questions please look in the FAQ below if you still can find the thing you are looking for. Just contact me on Discord at TeaBoi69.

# FAQ

## Will there be other versions other than fabric? 

Yes. I am on the works on that and by the end of the month there should be support for other mod loaders. 

## Will the mod pack get unlisted soon? 

Maybe. I will have to tweak it so it will so it will follow the guidelines but I am working on it. 

## What happens if there are any problems? 

I would have tested all the releases first, but if anything goes wrong please contact me. 

## If there are none of my questions here what do I do?

 Please contact me on Discord at TeaBoi69.
